name: Summer Peaches and Cream Parfait
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the ascorbic-citric mixture according to package directions and sprinkle over peaches, mixing well. Set aside.
2. Cream together butter and powdered sugar; add egg, beating well until thickened and coats a metal spoon.
3. Cook the egg mixture in the top of a double boiler, stirring constantly, until thickened. Allow it to cool.
4. Fold the cooled egg mixture into whipped cream. Alternate layers of whipped cream, cookie crumbs, peaches, and ginger in parfait glasses.
5. Chill for 2 hours before serving.
